'''Galthra''' was a female [[Akk dog/Legends|Akk dog]] native to [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. She had a [[Force-bond/Legends|Force bond]] with [[Liane Trevval]]. When Chalk died, she went mad and disappeared into the jungle.

{{Creature-stub}}
